item.title: Images of Note: The C Programming Language
item.description:
creechurs
So...is the purpose of the US Healthcare system just "fuck injured and sick people for all their money?" You refuse an ambulance because it's too expensive but GET CHARGED FOR THE AMBULANCE?!
THE CUBE!
Typhlosion is going to prison yo
the little nom nom at the end
?
chaos
This is what those "Kid works 20 hour shifts on the weekend to pay off kid's lunch debt" stories look like to me, like you're just doing what the people who made lunch debt up want you to do, work long hours for low pay as a child to pay off money that you forced to pay.
Look up Geli Raubal
Fuck Copilot
ngl I wanna dress in lots of layers.
Hatsune Priestku
SILENCE PISS BOY! YOU WILL BE SENT TO THE PISS DIMENSION FOR YOUR CRIMES.
This is basically what my depression feels like.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: 15/? Oblina from Aaahh!!! Real Monsters
item.description: “A human works from sun to sun, but a monster's work is never done!” 15/? ? Oblina from Aaahh!!! Real Monsters I am doing a costume a day for the entire month and I am raising money for charity while doing so! Read more about it here :) https://imgur.com/gallery/see-y-all-tomorrow-GJKtKLD

item.title: Beat raise is swapping companies
item.description: Maybe americas not so bad ja Dievs ir īsts, tā ir patiesība, ka viņš mīl. Es to zinu, jo, neskatoties uz visām pasaules ciešanām, viņš svētīja pasauli kopā ar jums. un tu esi mīlēts, un tu esi kaut ko vērts, un es tevi mīlu!

item.title: Cat Memes to cure your depression
item.description: if you enjoy these these amazing cat memes, we are currently running a website where we create cute (or not so cute!) pillows from your pet pictures that will resemble your pet and we give a % out of our earnings to animal shelter charities each month! If you wish to help out, please consider getting yours today :) Link: https://pawspromise.com/products/your-custom-pet-promise-pillow Thanksss!!

item.title: I have a friend named Kevin who always seems to have weird stories about events that occur at the bathroom at work (on a military base). So I honor him with toilet memes. Here’s the latest big dump I sent him.

item.title: Giga Game Dump for your scrolling pleasure.
item.description:
Never, EVER talk about your plans post-war! Nor show pictures of your loved ones!
Some worlds are meant to be forgotten.
EDIT: Thanks a lot for the upvotes, Imgurians! Remember, NO PREORDERS! I do some reviews (As a hobby, not paid!) at https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/ feel free to check them!
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: Christina Applegate, pictured in 1990.
item.description: After a double mastectomy and diagnoses of multiple sclerosis, she stated in 2023 that she will no longer appear in front of a camera but is open to doing voice work. I wish her well
